name: The Dark Lord's Army
tagline: Durability is the point — recover from wipes trivially and let the drain do the work
idea: Sauron punishes opponents for playing the game: every spell they cast amasses your Army, every card they draw bleeds them. There is no explosive turn — you assemble a tax-and-drain web and grind the table out over several cycles.
briefKillsCaption: two ways life totals hit zero

briefKills.line: Army amassed by opponent spells + evasion (Cover of Darkness / Rogue's Passage) → 10+ power unblockable Orc Army → focus one opponent in 2–3 swings
Gray Merchant of Asphodel ETB (high black devotion from the engine) → each opponent loses your black devotion on ETB → burst close

openings: Weakest axis — Kill Reliability (4/5): no single-turn finish; you win on accumulated advantage over 2–4 turns.
Fast combo can race the grind — the counter suite is the answer, not the clock.
Graveyard hate clamps the reset backup; the primary drain survives it.
Threat perception: the slowest clock in the sweep invites being ganged up before drain matters.

clock.src: lab dla_clock_lab @8k (MID pod tempo — engine is opponent-driven)
clock.note: The engine is opponent-driven — it kills FASTER against active pods, because amass and drain feed on opponents’ spells and draws.
clock.caption: No single explosive finish — drain accumulates over 2–4 turns, the slowest clock in the sweep. Manage threat perception so you aren’t ganged up before it matters.

gamePlan: Sauron punishes opponents for playing the game. Every spell an opponent casts triggers amass Orcs 1, growing a single Army token passively. The deck gives that Army evasion, connects for combat damage to trigger Ring temptation, then uses the Ring’s draw-4 ability alongside Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to drain massive life every turn cycle. The Army is treated as expendable — sacrifice it for cards, mana, or forced sacrifices, and it reforms for free the next time any opponent casts a spell.
winLine: Sheoldred/Underworld Dreams/Wound Reflection drain + Gary close

finishers.name: Drain
finishers.note: Sheoldred + Underworld Dreams + Bowmasters punish opponents’ card draws — 3 life per draw (Sheoldred 2, Underworld Dreams 1) plus a Bowmasters ping on bonus draws.

finishers.name: Voltron Army
finishers.note: The Army grows via amass stacking across the turn cycle.

finishers.name: Aristocrats Grind
finishers.note: Dictate of Erebos + Goblin Bombardment + Pitiless Plunderer.

finishers.name: Graveyard Reset
finishers.note: Ring temptation discards stock the graveyard.

rulings.name: The Ring-tempt draw gains you life
rulings.note: (Sheoldred fires on your 4 draws) — it's a defensive cushion, not opponent drain. Opponents bleed when they draw, not when you do.

rulings.name: The Army reforms for free on the next opponent's spell
rulings.note: board wipes are only a speed bump, so sacrifice it freely for value.

rulings.name: Sauron has ward — sacrifice a legendary artifact or legendary creature
rulings.note: which makes targeted removal on him very expensive for opponents.

rulings.name: Strionic Resonator copies Sauron's amass trigger
rulings.note: (also works on Saruman's amass or Pitiless Plunderer's Treasure trigger) for explosive turns.

rulings.name: Barad-dûr is a hidden amass engine
rulings.note: {X}{X}{B}, {T}: amass Orcs X if a creature died this turn.

rulings.name: Reanimation pulls from the graveyard, not amass
rulings.note: it's a separate recovery tool, not part of the Army loop.

mull.strategy: Looking for: lands + ramp toward a turn-5–6 Sauron, plus an early drain piece (Underworld Dreams, Sheoldred) or interaction to survive into the grind. Land-heavy keeps (up to 5) are genuinely fine here — the deck grinds out of them by design, and its keep shape (reach the 6-mana Sauron on curve) is the best-aligned mulligan model on the roster (mulligan audit 2026-07-03).

killTree.title: The Dark Lord's Army — Sauron, the Dark Lord
killTree.root:
Sauron resolved — engine is OPPONENT-DRIVEN
every opponent spell amasses Orcs; the draw-punishers drain on every opponent draw
killTree.stall:
let the pod play the game — amass + drain feed on THEIR spells and draws;
deploy engine pieces and hold up interaction (faster vs active pods)
killTree.caption: parallel vectors — they stack, not rank

background.need:
Sheoldred + Underworld Dreams + Bowmasters
(Wound Reflection doubles the end-step loss)
background.kill: all-opponent drain on every opponent draw

lines.need:
Army amassed by opponent spells
+ evasion (Cover of Darkness / Rogue's Passage)
lines.kill: 10+ power unblockable Orc Army → focus one opponent in 2–3 swings

lines.need:
Gray Merchant of Asphodel ETB
(high black devotion from the engine)
lines.kill: each opponent loses your black devotion on ETB → burst close

lines.need:
Dictate of Erebos + Goblin Bombardment + Pitiless Plunderer
(sac the Army, it reforms free)
lines.kill: forced opponent sacs + Treasure → relentless grind

lines.need:
Living Death / Reanimate / Agadeem's Awakening
(Ring discards stock the yard)
lines.kill: reanimate Sheoldred / Gray Merchant / Yawgmoth → re-fire the drain
